title: Working with watches
text: Working with watches Add watches from the debugger main window or from the browser. To set watches on ProcScript functions, fields, and component variables: Choose View > Select Watches . If the debugger is not in control, this menu item is unavailable. Select Scope and type of Function to determine the list of Selectable Watches . In the Selectable Watches list, select the items to watch and click the Add icon. To select multiple items, use Ctrl+Click and Shift-Click . You can also use the Select All and Deselect All icons to select and clear all items. To set a watch on an expression: From the debugger, choose View > Quick Watch . Enter an expression and click Add Watch . The expression is added to the Watches pane. To set a watch on a field or variable from the browser, highlight the field or variable in the Structure pane, right-click, and choose Add Watch . To remove a watch, in the Watches pane of the debugger, select the watched item, right-click, and choose Remove . To save the current list of watches, choose View > Preferences . and click Save .
